Name: SQL - Create SQL User If Not Exists
Description: Create a SQL Login if the login doesn't already exist without using SMO.

Parameters.Name: createSqlServer
Parameters.Label: SQL Server
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Server to perform the action on

Parameters.Name: createSqlLoginUserWhoHasCreateUserRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Login
Parameters.HelpText:
The user who has permissions to create the user

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: createSqlLoginPasswordWhoHasRights
Parameters.Label: SQL Password
Parameters.HelpText:
The password of the user who has permissions to create SQL Logins

Leave blank for integrated security

Parameters.Name: createSqlLogin
Parameters.Label: Username to create
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Login name that will be created

Parameters.Name: createSqlPassword
Parameters.Label: Password
Parameters.HelpText: The password of the user being created.  Leave this blank if you want to use windows authentication.

Parameters.Name: createSqlDefaultDatabase
Parameters.Label: Default Database
Parameters.HelpText: The default database for the user
